# Prepaid Resource Packs

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/productBilling/prePaidResourcePackage`
- Source markdown path: `/src/docs/productBilling/prePaidResourcePackage/en.md`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/en-CS0xJCVz.js`

## Content (HTML)

<h1 id="prepaid-resource-packs" tabindex="-1">Prepaid Resource Packs</h1>
<hr>
<h2 id="video-generation-resource-package" tabindex="-1">Video Generation Resource Package</h2>
<ul>
<li>Credit Deduction Details</li>
</ul>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="paid-1">
<p>For the detailed list and corresponding unit deductions, please refer to: <a href="/global/dev/document-api/quickStart/productIntroduction/effectsCenter">Video Effects Center</a>
</p>
</div>
<div class="teleport-fragment" style="display:none;" id="paid-2">
<p>The deducted units from the resource package vary based on the model and mode:</p>
<ul>
<li>When model_name is kling-v1-6 and mode is std: 2 units (equivalent to $0.28)</li>
<li>When model_name is kling-v1-6 and mode is pro: 3.5 units (equivalent to $0.49)</li>
</ul>
</div>

## Plain Text Snapshot

Prepaid Resource Packs Video Generation Resource Package Credit Deduction Details For the detailed list and corresponding unit deductions, please refer to: Video Effects Center The deducted units from the resource package vary based on the model and mode: When model_name is kling-v1-6 and mode is std: 2 units (equivalent to $0.28) When model_name is kling-v1-6 and mode is pro: 3.5 units (equivalent to $0.49)
